title: Yarn Script Editor Options
description: Options for Yarn Script Editors (e.g. Try, Playground, Yarn Spinner for VS Code).

saliencyStrategy.description: Strategy for selecting which node group member to run when multiple are available.

startNode.description: The node to start dialogue from in the preview. Defaults to 'Start'.

characters.description: Character definitions for highlighting, autocomplete, and preview colours.

presenter.description: The dialogue presenter to use in the preview panel.

previewFontSize.description: Font size in pixels for the dialogue preview panel.

editorFontSize.description: Font size in pixels for the project editor panel.

spellcheck.description: Spell checking configuration for this project.

enable.description: Whether spell checking is enabled for this project's .yarn files.

words.description: Custom words to add to the spell checker dictionary.

imagePath.description: Path to a directory containing images referenced by node 'image' headers, relative to the .yarnproject.

projectGraphPositions.description: Saved file container positions in the project-wide graph view. Managed automatically.

projectGraphColours.description: Saved file container colours in the project-wide graph view. Managed automatically.
